$schema_comment: Phase RX — server-side allowlist for /proxy/fetch. The Cloud Function fetches this file from this git repo at boot + on a 5-minute TTL refresh. Adding a new API = git PR here, no Cloud Function redeploy. Each entry: hostname (no scheme), optional pathPrefix (must startsWith), notes (free-form, served back to debugging clients).

hosts.notes: US National Weather Service — free, no auth. CORS open.
Free worldwide weather forecast API. CORS open.
Free city-name → lat/lng geocoder. Pairs with api.open-meteo.com.
OSM geocoder. Subject to OSM usage policy — please don't hammer.
Wikipedia REST API — page summaries, search.
Mock user data — useful for design/demo apps.
Crypto spot prices (read-only). No auth needed.
